introduction_text:
Whistleblowing / Protected Disclosure Notice

This platform allows you to submit an anonymous report, protected disclosure, or whistleblower statement for investigation by the Company.

You are encouraged to provide as much relevant detail as possible to assist with a proper and effective investigation.

Anonymity and Confidentiality

You may submit your report anonymously.

We will take reasonable steps to preserve your anonymity and the confidentiality of the information provided.

However, please note:

  • absolute anonymity cannot be guaranteed in all circumstances;
  • your identity may become apparent from the information you choose to disclose; and
  • disclosure of information may be required by law or necessary for investigation, legal proceedings, or regulatory compliance.

We will not knowingly attempt to identify anonymous reporters unless required by law or necessary to prevent fraud, security threats, or abuse of the system.

Legal Framework

Reports submitted through this platform are handled in accordance with:

  • the Protected Disclosures Act, 26 of 2000; and
  • the Protection of Personal Information Act, 4 of 2013 (POPIA).

Where applicable, individuals who make disclosures in good faith are entitled to protection under the Protected Disclosures Act.

Protection Against Retaliation

The Company does not tolerate retaliation, victimisation, or any form of adverse treatment against individuals who make disclosures in good faith.

Use of Information

Where a report is submitted:

  • information will be processed solely for the purpose of receiving, assessing, investigating, managing, and resolving the report;
  • processing is undertaken in support of the Company’s legal, governance, risk, ethics, and compliance obligations;
  • access to reports is strictly limited to authorised personnel who require access for investigation, remediation, legal advice, compliance, or reporting purposes;
  • appropriate, reasonable technical and organisational safeguards are implemented to protect the information.

Nature of Information

Reports may contain allegations about individuals and may include personal or sensitive information voluntarily provided by the reporter.

You should provide only information that is relevant and necessary to the concern being reported.

Good Faith and Abuse of the System

This reporting channel must be used responsibly and in good faith.

Reports that are knowingly false, malicious, frivolous, or submitted with intent to mislead or harm others may constitute misconduct and may be subject to disciplinary or legal action where the identity of the reporter becomes known.

Privacy

All personal information is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws.
name: anonymous-report
success_message: You have successfuly reported the Incident or Concern and we will investigate the issue immediately. Strict confidentiality will be applied.
title: Anonymous Report
